message:
fix(ft-api): tensor_diagflat delegates to diag_embed via flatten [bd-lgps]

tensor_diagflat used to extract values, build the matrix manually
in plain f64, and rebuild a requires_grad=false leaf — silently
severing autograd. PyTorch's torch.diagflat IS differentiable;
mathematically diagflat(x, offset) == diag_embed(flatten(x), offset).

tensor_diag_embed was made autograd-aware under frankentorch-d180.
Replace the manual body with composition through tensor_reshape +
tensor_diag_embed:
  - reshape input to 1-D if it isn't already
  - delegate to diag_embed with the same offset
  - range-check the i64 offset for the i32 diag_embed contract

Same observable arithmetic, autograd flows.

Closes frankentorch-lgps. ft-api lib tests: 1171 passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
